description: correct_fact: old fact gets retracted_at + superseded_by; replacement (extraction='user') copies valid_from AND valid_to (here NULL->NULL, open target). as_of= sees each belief era. CORRECTION (impl session 2026-07-07): the include_retracted query's expect_facts order was flipped from [Sonet,Sonnet] to [Sonnet,Sonet]. Both facts share valid_from (1751000000000) and predicate (vocab.corrects_to); the spec's stated total order for facts_about is valid_from ASC, predicate ASC, id ASC. The only tiebreaker is the sha256 fact id: Sonnet(user)=f_98e787f29c217ee0 < Sonet(det)=f_ea9c500f9242d8ce, so the deterministic order is Sonnet then Sonet. The original order assumed assertion/insertion order, which the facts_about contract does not use. Set of facts is unchanged; the two as_of-filtered queries each return a single row and are unaffected.
